selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: n. 男孩
n. 市场, 交易, 集市, 推销地区, 行情, 市面, 销路；vt. 在市场上交易, 使上市, 销售
words.definition: n. the world of commercial activity where goods and services are bought and sold

words.translation: n. 母亲, 修女院长；vt. 产生, 照看, 收养
words.definition: n. a woman who has given birth to a child (also used as a term of address to your mother)

words.translation: n. 绿色, 绿色颜料；a. 绿色的, 未成熟的, 新鲜的, 青春的, 无经验的, 脸色发青的
words.definition: n. green color or pigment; resembling the color of growing grass

words.translation: n. 城镇, 市, 镇
words.definition: n. an urban area with a fixed boundary that is smaller than a city

words.translation: n. 女孩, 少女, 女佣
words.definition: n. a young woman

words.translation: n. 插座, 千斤顶, 男人；vt. 抬起, 提醒, 扛举, 增加, 提高, 放弃
words.definition: n. a small worthless amount

words.translation: n. 蓝色；a. 蓝色的, 下流的, 忧郁的
words.definition: n. blue color or pigment; resembling the color of the clear sky in the daytime

words.translation: n. 脚, 步调, 英尺, 底部, 末尾, 步兵；vt. 走在...上, 给...换底, 支付
words.definition: n. the part of the leg of a human being below the ankle joint

words.translation: n. 游戏, 游玩, 玩笑, 运动, 比赛, 赌博, 跳动, 表演, 剧本；v. 玩, 游戏, 假装, 开玩笑, 比赛, 扮演, 演奏, 演戏, 传摇曳, (使)跳动
words.definition: n. a dramatic work intended for performance by actors on a stage

words.translation: n. 去, 离去, 工作情况, 地面状况, 行为；a. 进行中的, 流行的, 成功的, 现存的
words.definition: n. advancing toward a goal

words.translation: n. 小山, 丘陵, 小土堆；vt. 作成土堆, 堆成小丘
words.definition: n. a local and well-defined elevation of the land

words.translation: n. 环, 环形物, 拳击场, 戒指, 角逐, 小集团, 铃声, 钟声, 声调；vt. 包围, 套住, 按铃, 敲钟
words.definition: n. a characteristic sound

words.translation: v. 吃, 腐蚀
words.definition: v. take in solid food

words.translation: n. 马, 骑兵, 脚架；vi. 骑马, 取笑
words.definition: n. solid-hoofed herbivorous quadruped domesticated since prehistoric times

words.translation: a. 漂亮的, 优美的, 机灵的, 狡猾的, 恰当的；adv. 相当, 颇
words.definition: s. pleasing by delicacy or grace; not imposing

words.translation: adv. 离去
words.definition: r. from a particular thing or place or position (`forth' is obsolete)

words.translation: vt. 买, 获得；vi. 买
words.definition: v. obtain by purchase; acquire by means of a financial transaction

words.translation: n. 墙, 墙壁, 垣, 内壁, 分界物, 屏障；a. 墙的
words.definition: n. an architectural partition with a height and length greater than its thickness; used to divide or enclose an area or to support another structure

words.translation: n. 水, 雨水, 海水, 水位, 水面, 流水；vt. 给...浇水, 供以水, 注入水, 使湿
words.definition: n. binary compound that occurs at room temperature as a clear colorless odorless tasteless liquid; freezes into ice below 0 degrees centigrade and boils above 1

words.translation: n. 白色, 洁白, 眼白, 白种人, 蛋白；a. 白色的, 纯洁的, 白种的, 苍白的, 空白的, 幸运的
words.definition: n. the quality or state of the achromatic color of greatest lightness (bearing the least resemblance to black)

words.translation: a. 失去的, 遗失的, 迷惑的；lose的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: a. no longer in your possession or control; unable to be found or recovered

words.translation: n. 罚款, 罚金, 晴天, 精细；a. 好的, 晴朗的, 健康的, 细小的, 精细的
words.definition: n. money extracted as a penalty

words.translation: n. 家, 避难所, 故乡；a. 家庭的, 国内的, 打中目标的
words.definition: n. where you live at a particular time

words.translation: n. 失误, 避免, 失败, 小姐；vt. 未得到, 未达到, 未听到, 未觉察, 逃脱, 遗漏, 错过, 思念
words.definition: n. a failure to hit (or meet or find etc)

words.translation: vt. 可作...用, 服务, 经历, 招待, 供应, 送交, 对待；vi. 服务, 服役, 侍应, 适合, 有用, 开球
words.definition: v. serve a purpose, role, or function

words.translation: prep. 包围, 在...周围, 四处；adv. 兜着圈子, 在附近, 到处
words.definition: r. by a circular or circuitous route

words.translation: n. 褐色；a. 褐色的
words.definition: n. an orange of low brightness and saturation

words.translation: n. 美元, 元(加、澳等国货币单位)
words.definition: n. the basic monetary unit in many countries; equal to 100 cents

words.translation: vi. 拉, 拖, 拔剑；vt. 拖拉, 挨近, 领取, 打成平局, 引导, 抽签决定, 画, 描写, 制订, 草拟, 吸引
adv. 相当, 完全, 十分
words.definition: r. to a degree (not used with a negative)

words.translation: vi. 坐, 就座, 坐落；vt. 使就座, 骑
words.definition: v. be seated

words.translation: n. 儿子, 女婿, 子孙
words.definition: n. a male human offspring

words.translation: n. 妻子, 太太, 夫人
words.definition: n. a married woman; a man's partner in marriage

words.translation: n. 奶, 乳状物；vt. 挤乳, 榨取
words.definition: n. a white nutritious liquid secreted by mammals and used as food by human beings

words.translation: n. 口袋, 钱袋, 钱, 容器；vt. 装...在口袋里, 隐藏, 抑制, 私吞, 搁置, 击...入袋
words.definition: n. a small pouch inside a garment for carrying small articles

words.translation: a. 孤独的, 单独的, 独自的；adv. 独自地
words.definition: s. isolated from others

words.translation: n. 婴孩
words.definition: n. a very young child (birth to 1 year) who has not yet begun to walk or talk

words.translation: n. 角落, 转角, 窘境；vt. 迫至一隅, 垄断, 使陷入绝境
words.definition: n. a place off to the side of an area

words.translation: n. 脂肪, 脂油, 肥肉；a. 肥的, 胖的, 油腻的
words.definition: n. a soft greasy substance occurring in organic tissue and consisting of a mixture of lipids (mostly triglycerides)

words.translation: n. 国王, 君主；vt. 使...成为君主
words.definition: n. a male sovereign; ruler of a kingdom

words.translation: n. 淑女, 夫人, 女士, 贵妇
words.definition: n. a polite name for any woman

words.translation: n. 举起, 帮助, 昂扬, 电梯；vt. 升高, 提高, 鼓舞, 清偿, 空运, 举起, 剽窃
words.definition: n. the act of giving temporary assistance

words.translation: n. 王后, 女王；vt. 立为女王
words.definition: n. the only fertile female in a colony of social insects such as bees and ants and termites; its function is to lay eggs

words.translation: n. 骑马, 乘坐, 乘车, 搭便车；vt. 骑, 乘坐, 压迫, 控制
words.definition: n. a mechanical device that you ride for amusement or excitement

words.translation: n. 岩石, 岩礁, 石头, 基石, 暗礁, 摇动, 摇滚乐；vt. 摇摆, 摇动, 使摇晃, 使动摇
words.definition: n. a lump or mass of hard consolidated mineral matter

words.translation: adv. 在后地；prep. 在...背后
words.definition: r. in or to or toward the rear

words.translation: n. 少量, 马嚼子, 辅币；vt. 给马上嚼子, 控制
words.definition: n. a small fragment of something broken off from the whole

words.translation: n. 十字架, 十字架形物件, 交叉, 十字标, 交叉路, 磨难, 杂交；a. 生气的, 交叉的, 相反的
words.definition: n. a wooden structure consisting of an upright post with a transverse piece

words.translation: n. 杯子, 茶杯, 优胜杯；vt. 使成杯状, 为...拔火罐
words.definition: n. a small open container usually used for drinking; usually has a handle

words.translation: n. 切口, 割伤, 降低, 切, 割, 砍, 削, 伤口, 削减, 缩短, 删节, 通路；a. 经切割的, 缩减的
words.definition: n. a share of the profits

words.translation: n. 女儿；a. 女儿的
words.definition: n. a female human offspring

words.translation: n. 落下, 瀑布, 采伐量, 下降, 落差, 降低, 堕落, 秋天；vi. 倒下, 落下, 来临, 失守, 阵亡, 下跌, 减弱, 倾斜, 垮台, 轮到, 变成, 降低
words.definition: n. the season when the leaves fall from the trees

words.translation: a. 远的, 久远的, 遥远的；adv. 甚远地, 很, 到很深的程度, 到很远的距离
words.definition: a. located at a great distance in time or space or degree

words.translation: n. 全部, 完整；a. 充满的, 完全的, 丰富的, 完美的, 丰满的, 详尽的
n. 土地, 战场, 场地, 地面, 范围；a. 土地的, 地面上的
words.definition: n. a position to be won or defended in battle (or as if in battle)

words.translation: vt. 种植, 使长满；vi. 生长, 变成, 发展

words.translation: a. 迟的, 晚的, 已故的；adv. 很晚, 很迟, 晚
words.definition: a. being or occurring at an advanced period of time or after a usual or expected time

words.translation: n. 比赛, 火柴, 对手；vt. 使相配, 使比赛, 与...竞争
words.definition: n. lighter consisting of a thin piece of wood or cardboard tipped with combustible chemical; ignites with friction

words.translation: n. 页, 记录, 事件, 专栏, 男侍；vt. 标明...的页数, 翻...的书页, 分页排版, 呼叫, 侍候
words.definition: n. one side of one leaf (of a book or magazine or newspaper or letter etc.) or the written or pictorial matter it contains

words.translation: n. 路, 道路, 公路, 途径, 方法
words.definition: n. an open way (generally public) for travel or transportation

words.translation: n. 羊, 胆小者
words.definition: n. woolly usually horned ruminant mammal related to the goat

words.translation: adv. 不久, 早, 快, 宁可
words.definition: r. in the near future

words.translation: n. 街道, 马路, 街区；a. 街道的
words.definition: n. a thoroughfare (usually including sidewalks) that is lined with buildings

words.translation: n. 走, 散步, 步行, 行走的路程, 竞走, 散步场所；vi. 走路, 步行, 处世

words.translation: a. 年轻的, 无经验的, 朝气蓬勃的；n. 青年们, 幼小动物, 崽
n. 吹, 打击, 殴打, 花开；v. 吹, 风吹, 吹响, 开花
words.definition: n. a powerful stroke with the fist or a weapon

words.translation: n. 面包, 生计, 食物；vt. 裹以面包屑
words.definition: n. food made from dough of flour or meal and usually raised with yeast or baking powder and then baked

words.translation: interj. 再会, 回头见

words.translation: n. 蛋糕, 块, 饼；vt. 使结块, 加块状物于
words.definition: n. a block of solid substance (such as soap or wax)

words.translation: n. 草, 草原, 牧场
words.definition: n. narrow-leaved green herbage: grown as lawns; used as pasture for grazing animals; cut and dried as hay

words.translation: n. 噪音, 杂音, 响声, 喧闹；vt. 谣传
words.definition: n. sound of any kind (especially unintelligible or dissonant sound)

words.translation: n. 匆促, 冲进, 急流, 灯心草；vi. 冲, 奔, 闯, 赶紧, 匆促行事, 涌现

words.translation: n. 洗, 洗涤, 冲洗, 洗的衣服, 冲积物, 洼地；vt. 洗, 洗涤, 洗清, 用水冲洗, 流过, 弄湿, 粉刷, 镀金属薄层于

words.translation: num. 十, 十个

words.translation: n. 床, 睡眠处, 河床, 底座, 路基, 一层；vt. 提供宿处, 栽种, 安装

words.translation: n. 桥, 舰桥, 桥梁, 桥牌；vt. 架桥于, 跨越
words.definition: n. a structure that allows people or vehicles to cross an obstacle such as a river or canal or railway etc.

words.translation: a. 明亮的, 聪明的, 鲜明的, 欢快的；adv. 明亮地, 欢快地
words.definition: a. emitting or reflecting light readily or in large amounts

words.translation: a. 干净的, 清白的, 简洁的；adv. 清洁地, 完全地
n. 叫声, 哭声, 大叫；vi. 哭, 叫, 喊
words.definition: n. a loud utterance; often in protest or opposition

words.translation: n. 服装, 覆盖物；vi. 穿着
words.definition: n. a one-piece garment for a woman; has skirt and bodice

words.translation: n. 饮料, 酒；v. 喝, 喝酒
words.definition: n. a single serving of a beverage

words.translation: n. 展览会, 市集, 美好的事物；a. 公平的, 按规则进行的, 不好不坏的, 晴朗的, 美丽的

words.translation: a. 快速的, 紧的；adv. 很快地, 紧紧地, 彻底地

words.translation: n. 花园, 果园, 菜园；vi. 栽培花木
words.definition: n. a plot of ground where plants are cultivated

words.translation: n. 黄金, 钱财, 金块, 金色, 宝贵；a. 金的, 似金的, 金色的, 金制的

words.translation: n. 假日, 假期, 节日；vi. 度假

words.translation: n. 青年, 家伙, 少年, 情人
n. 腿, 假腿, 路程；vi. 走, 跑
words.definition: n. a human limb; commonly used to refer to a whole limb but technically only the part of the limb between the knee and ankle

words.translation: vt. 与...结婚, 娶, 嫁；vi. 结婚
words.definition: v. take in marriage

words.translation: n. 星期一
words.definition: n. the second day of the week; the first working day

words.translation: a. 贫穷的, 贫乏的, 不幸的, 可怜的, 拙劣的, 卑鄙的
words.definition: a. having little money or few possessions

words.translation: vi. 唱, 唱歌, 演唱, 鸣, 啼；vt. 唱, 歌颂

words.translation: n. 睡眠, 静止, 昏迷, 麻木, 长眠, 冬眠；vi. 睡觉, 睡眠, 静止

words.translation: n. 星期日；a. 星期日的, 业余的

words.translation: n. 茶, 茶叶

words.translation: vt. 投, 掷, 抛, 发射, 摔下, 匆匆穿上(或脱下), 抛弃, 摆脱；vi. 丢, 掷, 抛
n. 带子, 线, 鞋带, 领带, 领结, 关系, 束缚, 平局, 不分胜负；vt. 系, 打结, 扎, 约束, 与...成平局

words.translation: n. 雄性动物, 雄猫
words.definition: n. male cat

words.translation: n. 树, 木料, 树状物；vt. 把...赶上树
words.definition: n. a tall perennial woody plant having a main trunk and branches forming a distinct elevated crown; includes both gymnosperms and angiosperms

words.translation: n. 角, 角质, 喇叭, 号角；a. 角制的
words.definition: n. a noisemaker (as at parties or games) that makes a loud noise when you blow through it

words.translation: n. 丝, 绸, 绸锻类, 丝织品；a. 丝的, 丝织的
words.definition: n. a fabric made from the fine threads produced by certain insect larvae

words.translation: prep. 在旁边
words.definition: n. At the side of; on one side of.

words.translation: n. 奶油, 黄油；vt. 涂黄油于
words.definition: n. an edible emulsion of fat globules made by churning milk or cream; for cooking and table use

words.translation: n. 猫, 恶妇；vi. 呕吐
words.definition: n. feline mammal usually having thick soft fur and no ability to roar: domestic cats; wildcats

words.translation: n. 母牛, 母兽；vt. 威胁
words.definition: n. female of domestic cattle: "`moo-cow' is a child's term"

words.translation: a. 肮脏的, 卑鄙的；vt. 弄脏
words.definition: a. soiled or likely to soil with dirt or grime

words.translation: n. 吻；vt. 吻

words.translation: n. 小刀, 匕首；vt. 切割, 伤害, 切, 戳
words.definition: n. edge tool used as a cutting instrument; has a pointed blade with a sharp edge and a handle

words.translation: a. 左边的, 左倾的, 左侧的, 左派的；adv. 在左面
n. 思想, 愿望, 智力, 记忆, 心理, 情绪, 理智, 主意, 心意；vi. 介意, 注意, 留心
words.definition: n. that which is responsible for one's thoughts and feelings; the seat of the faculty of reason

words.translation: n. 月亮, 月球, 月光；vi. 闲荡
words.definition: n. the natural satellite of the Earth

words.translation: n. 鼻子, 突出部分, 嗅觉；vt. 嗅到, 探出, 用鼻子触

words.translation: n. 便士, 一分, 小钱, 点滴

words.definition: n. footwear shaped to fit the foot (below the ankle) with a flexible upper of leather or plastic and a sole and heel of heavier material

words.translation: n. 银, 银币, 银器；a. 银的, 银制的, 银器的
words.definition: n. a soft white precious univalent metallic element having the highest electrical and thermal conductivity of any metal; occurs in argentite and in free form; u

words.translation: n. 糖, 糖块, 甜言蜜语；vt. 加糖于, 使甜蜜, 粉饰, 美化
words.definition: n. a white crystalline carbohydrate used as a sweetener and preservative

words.translation: n. 甜蜜, 糖果, 情人；a. 甜的, 芳香的, 悦耳的, 漂亮的, 和蔼的, 不咸的, 灵活的, 轻快的
words.definition: n. English phonetician; one of the founders of modern phonetics (1845-1912)

words.translation: prep. 直到, 在...以前, 迄；conj. 直到...为止
words.definition: n. unstratified soil deposited by a glacier; consists of sand and clay and gravel and boulders mixed together

words.translation: n. 黄色；a. 黄色的
words.definition: n. yellow color or pigment; the chromatic color resembling the hue of sunflowers or ripe lemons

words.translation: num. 八, 八个
words.definition: n. the cardinal number that is the sum of seven and one

words.translation: vt. 建立, 创立, 铸造；find的过去式和过去分词
num. 九, 九个
words.definition: n. the cardinal number that is the sum of eight and one

words.translation: n. 计划, 设计, 事业；vt. 计划, 设计, 投掷, 发射, 使凸出, 放映
words.definition: n. a planned undertaking

words.translation: a. 不同的, 各种的, 多方面的, 许多的, 个别的, 杂色的
n. 男人, 家伙
